subject: [RFC v2 10/21] mm: thp: handle split failure in mremap move_page_tables()

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the potential for double-put bugs when splitting huge PMDs. Suggested adding an extra folio_get() before replace_page_cache_folio() to maintain the reference.

2026-02-26.patch_summary: This patch series proposes handling split failures in the move_page_tables() function, which is responsible for splitting huge PMDs when they cannot be moved at PMD granularity. The current implementation breaks out of the loop on split failure and returns the amount of memory that was successfully moved.
